packages.title: Cassie / MAGPIE 8-bit interface
packages.summary: A 320x240 archive instrument with active maps, signal panels, humanized cursor motion, and event-linked typing and audio.

packages.title: Hi-fi dashboard
packages.summary: A more detailed continuous work session built from embedded screens, archive routing, scanning, and spatially organized information.

packages.title: MAGPIE SYS/03 / DOS operational interface
packages.summary: Low-resolution orange-on-charcoal operational systems: radar sweeps, routing paths, terminal fragments, and continuously changing state.
